query: My custom API endpoint returns 404 when I try to call it from my storefront next app using createApiClients. The cartridge is deployed but something isn't connecting. How do I debug this end-to-end?

I deployed a custom loyalty-points API and now I need to add it to my storefront next project with b2c sfnext scapi add custom and then call it from my account page loader. Walk me through the full workflow.

I have a custom shopper API that I can call from Postman but when I call it through createApiClients in my storefront next loader I get a 401 unauthorized. How do I fix the auth scheme mismatch between my api.json and the sfnext context?

What's the complete end-to-end workflow for making a custom SCAPI endpoint callable as a typed client from my storefront next loaders? I have the cartridge registered and want to know the sfnext-specific steps.
After running b2c sfnext scapi add custom my-inventory-api v1, how do I use the generated typed client in my storefront next route loader to call the checkStock endpoint?
I need to write the schema.yaml OpenAPI spec and script.js controller for a new custom API that returns product recommendations based on browsing history.
How do I check whether my custom API endpoints are registered and active on my sandbox instance? I just want to see the registration status.
I need to call the standard shopperProducts.getProduct API from my product detail page loader. What's the pattern for using createApiClients with the built-in clients?
I want to add the shopper-search standard SCAPI to my storefront next project so I can build a search page.
How do I deploy my custom API cartridge code version to the sandbox and activate it using the b2c CLI?
